section.heading: Establishment
section.chapeau: In accordance with this subchapter, the Secretary shall establish a Rural Business Investment Program, under which the Secretary may—

paragraph.content: enter into participation agreements with companies granted final approval under section 2009cc–3(e) of this title for the purposes set forth in section 2009cc–1 of this title;
guarantee the debentures issued by rural business investment companies as provided in section 2009cc–4 of this title; and
make grants to rural business investment companies, and to other entities, under section 2009cc–7 of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 384C, as added Pub. L. 107–171, title VI, § 6029, May 13, 2002, 116 Stat. 391.)
